privacidad.introduccion: At AI Robotics S.A.C. ("AI Robotics", "we") we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you entrust to us. This policy describes how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you interact with our website and services.

secciones.contenido: We collect the data you voluntarily provide via the contact form: name, email, optional phone, company and message. We also collect basic technical browsing information (IP address, browser, pages visited) for analytics and security purposes.

We use your data exclusively to respond to your inquiry, schedule commercial meetings, send the information you requested, and improve our site. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
Processing is based on the consent you grant when submitting the form and our legitimate interest in managing the commercial relationship.
We retain your data for the time necessary to handle your inquiry and, after that, for up to 24 months — unless the law requires a different period.
You can exercise your data rights (access, rectification, deletion, objection) by writing to privacy@airobotics.com.pe. We will respond within a maximum of 20 business days.

We use Cloudflare Turnstile to protect our forms against automated submissions. This tool may collect anonymous browser information to verify that you are a real person, without generating persistent identifiers.
We reserve the right to update this policy. The most recent version will always be available on this page, with the last-updated date.

terminos.introduccion: Use of this website and the services offered by AI Robotics S.A.C. is subject to the following terms.

secciones.contenido: All content on this site (texts, images, video, design and code) is the property of AI Robotics S.A.C. and is protected by Peruvian and international copyright law.
You may browse and consume the site's content for personal use and commercial evaluation. Total or partial reproduction without our express authorization is prohibited.

The products described on this site are at different stages of development. Images and specifications may correspond to prototypes and are subject to change. Any commercial commitment requires a specific written agreement.
AI Robotics S.A.C. is not responsible for damages derived from the use of the information published on this site. Information is provided for general informational and commercial purposes.
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Peru. Any controversy will be resolved before the courts of the Lima judicial district.

libroReclamaciones.introduccion: In compliance with the Peruvian Consumer Protection Code (Law No. 29571), AI Robotics S.A.C. provides its electronic Complaints Book.
libroReclamaciones.instrucciones: To file a complaint, please use the official electronic form at the link below. You will receive a tracking code at the registered email.

datosEmpresa.direccion: Av. Principal 123, San Isidro, Lima — Peru

libroReclamaciones.notaLegal: The provider will respond to your complaint within a maximum of 30 calendar days, as required by Law No. 29571.
